channel.title: Storytime on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Storytime on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Discovering D&D In 1979
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about discovering DnD in 1979.

item.title: Scenes From Unretirement
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about scenes from unretirement.

item.title: Unretirement
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about unretirement.

item.title: Commenting On Comments
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to do some commenting on comments.

item.title: The Joy Of Doing
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the joy of doing.

item.title: My Uncredited Game
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my uncredited game.

item.title: Deleted Channel Content
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to show you some deleted content from this channel.

item.title: The Outer Worlds Launch Party Video
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to share with you something special: The Outer Worlds launch party video.

item.title: My Rejected Star Trek TNG Script
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my rejected Star Trek next Generation script.

item.title: My First Day Of College
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to tell you a story about my first day of college.

item.title: An "Off The Rails" TTRPG Campaign
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk to you about an off the rails tabletop RPG campaign.

item.title: My Worst Job Interview
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my worst job interview.

item.title: Two Recent Mementos
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about two recent momentos I now have — and they’re behind me, and I’ll Point them out in a few minutes.

item.title: Unused GDC 1999 Roadtrip Presentation
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about RPG 2000.

item.title: About My Notes, Part 2
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my notes again.

item.title: Brushes With Famous People
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my brushes with famous people.

item.title: Snapshots Through My Career
item.description: Hey everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I wanted to do something fun that I’m going to call snapshots through my career, and

item.title: A College Story
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to tell a story about something that happened to me in college and before I tell the story I want to say the story itself is less important than the reason I want to tell the story which is to me.

item.title: Castles (1991) and Stonekeep (1995)
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about castles and stonekeep, two games at interplay.

item.title: Scenes From A Life Of Game Development
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to show you scenes from a life spent in game development.

item.title: The Story Of The Wig
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about the story of the wig.

item.title: The Story Of The Bag
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to tell a story about a picture that floats around on the internet of me with a paper bag on my head sitting at my desk.

item.title: True Stories With Me As The Villain
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about me being the bad guy.

item.title: Mementos: My T. Ray Isaac Original
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about another momento story.

item.title: The Fallout Team
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about the Fallout team.

item.title: Apology
item.description: On a previous video that I’ll link below. Someone I’ve worked with in the past was dead named. I’ve privately apologized to Rebecca heinemann, but I wanted to post this short as a retraction and a public apology. I’m sorry, Rebecca.

item.title: Fallout: Nuka Break
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about Fallout — Nuka break.

item.title: Developing South Park: The Stick Of Truth
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about South Park, the Stick of Truth, also lavalier mic, so hopefully this sounds better.

item.title: My Lost Decade
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my lost decade which is what I call 1993 to 2003, and I think

item.title: Troika Memories
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I wanted to reminisce about Troika.

item.title: Carbine Redux
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk a little more about carbine, because that video generated a lot of comments.

item.title: MMO Stories
item.description: Hey everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about why I got into MMOs, like why I even went to carbine in the first place to make an MMO, because a lot of people thought that this was a bit of a Divergence from what

item.title: Why I Left Carbine's WildStar
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about why I left carbine Studios.

item.title: How I Almost Made Wasteland 2
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about how I almost made Wasteland 2 in the late 90s, something I mentioned when I was having my chat with Scott Campbell kind of mentioned.

item.title: The First Time Fallout Was Almost Canceled
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk to you about the first time Fallout almost got canceled.

item.title: Interplay After Hours Game Playing
item.description: Hi everyone, it’s Tim. In previous videos I’ve talked about playing d, and gerps and LP muds. In this video I want to talk about how my game playing really took off when I started interplay. Now I thought I was a game player as a kid, you know in high school and college, but nothing prepared me for just how much game playing went on at interplay after I started. Now this is pretty much after I got hired. So in early 92 to about when Fallout kicked into high gear in 95, which also corresponds to about the time we switched buildings.

item.title: My Time With MUDs (Multi User Dungeons)
item.description: Hi everyone, it’s me, Tim, while I have a whole list of topics I want to talk about — and the list is getting longer — I spent all day yesterday thinking about muds. So I just jumped it to the top of the queue and I want to talk about muds today.

item.title: Making Rags To Riches (1993)
item.description: Hi. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Rags to Riches, which is the first game I made at interplay as an employee.

item.title: The Fun of The Temple of Elemental Evil
item.description: Hi everyone, it’s me, Tim, so yesterday’s video about Temple development to evil was a little heavier.

item.title: Pick a topic!
item.description: Hi, it’s me, Tim.
